caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storm Hits St Lucia
caribbean.paragraph: St. Lucia is experiencing 100% rain probability with winds of 11 kt and wave heights of 5.4 ft, while nearby Martinique is seeing winds of 14 kt. I expect these conditions to impact port operations in the Lesser Antilles, particularly in St. Lucia and Martinique, with the high rain probability being the main concern for navigation and outdoor activities.

mediterranean.headline: Calm Mediterranean Seas
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing less than 10% rain probability with winds of 11 kt and wave heights of 1.8 ft, while Athens is seeing winds of 12 kt with less than 10% rain probability, making for a relatively calm day in the Mediterranean region. I expect these gentle conditions to prevail, with Cadiz and Athens, the top impact ports, enjoying quiet weather with minimal wave action and low precipitation chances.
